session.user: Run `uv run ruff check src/erk/tui/commands/types.py src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py src/erk/tui/screens/launch_screen.py tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py` and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check on those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/tui/commands/types.py src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py src/erk/tui/screens/launch_screen.py tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py

session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed!
